en: What the hell are you doing to my car?
Hey, beat it, Spook. This don't concern you.
ko: 이리 꺼져, 스푼. 이건 네 일이 아니야.

en: Look, I don't wanna mess with no reefer addicts, okay?
ko: 난 마리화나 중독자랑 엮이고 싶지 않아, 알겠어?

en: Get home to your mama, boy.
Where is him? Where are your keys?
ko: 그 사람 어디 있어? 너의 열쇠는 어디 있어?

en: Hey, the keys are in the trunk. Say that again.
I said the keys are in here.
Hey, you, get your damn hands off.
I think you got the wrong car, McFly.
ko: 너 잘못된 차에 탄 것 같아, 맥플라이.
